title: Deliciously Dense American Ancho Chillies Skillet
description: A nostalgic American dish featuring ancho chillies, infused oil, and a yeasty flavor, made in a tagliere vessel and following ayurvedic sattvic friendly principles.
instructions: Heat the infused oil in the tagliere vessel over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the dried ancho chillies and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add the yeast, tomato paste, and water, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes.
Reduce the heat to low and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
